home_title: German that is easy to listen to, repeat, and speak.
home_lead: Short lessons, phrase-based player, voice recording, multilingual interface, and user reviews.
home_feature_1: B1 and B2 lessons with listening practice
home_feature_2: Phrase-based player with pause and repeat
home_section_text: The site is designed so you can quickly open a lesson, listen to phrases, repeat them aloud, and save progress.
home_step_1_text: The phrase-based SpeechSynthesis player helps you process German in small segments.
home_step_2_text: Shadowing mode adds a pause after each phrase so you can repeat what you heard.
home_step_3_text: Record your answer, check speech recognition, and compare yourself with the original.
home_levels_title: Start with a single text—and work on it until you can speak it confidently.
home_levels_text: These lessons can be used as a daily mini-workout: 10–15 minutes for listening, retelling, and repeating key expressions.
home_b1_text: Work, housing, health, travel, shopping, meetings.
home_b2_text: Opinions, arguments, plans, discussions, and retelling.
levels_text: Start with a single text—and work on it until you can speak it confidently.
levels_other_text: These levels can be added later as short introductory sections.
lesson_retell_placeholder: Write a short retelling of the lesson in German...
lesson_record_text: Record your answer, then listen to it or compare it with the original.
lesson_stt_text: If the browser supports speech recognition, you can dictate your answer and get text.
feedback_text: Rate the site and leave a comment. The feedback can be sent by email and saved locally.
feedback_consent: I allow this feedback to be published on the site after moderation
about_text: Deutsch Atelier is an open website for practicing German B1/B2.
about_mission_text: Make short lessons, listening, and speaking practice easy and accessible without subscriptions.
contact_text: For contact, you can use a separate project email.
contact_email_note: Later this address can be replaced with a dedicated domain email.
footer_text: Deutsch Atelier · open website for learning German.
